name: apsal-studio
description: Create live-action AI photography from natural language with bound references, interactive DNA cards, reproducible prompts, and resumable native-4K runs.

interface.shortDescription: 一句话构建世界，绑定参考图，生成九张真人摄影作品
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio turns one natural-language idea into interactive Character, World, Scene, and Photo DNA decisions, binds rights-aware reference images, compiles a live-action photography contract, and runs nine independent 9:16 native-4K Jobs. Its Registry, validators, compiler, and private Skill packager work offline; provider generation is optional and explicit.
defaultPrompt: 创建一套九张 9:16 真人摄影主题，并先确认参考图用途。
用自然语言设计 Character、World、Scene 和 Photo DNA，再导出私人 Skill。
继续未完成的 APSAL 原生 4K 九镜头生成，只续跑失败镜头。
